case_title: GEORGE JACKSON VS. BAY BRIDGE TOWING et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BAY BRIDGE TOWING PINEDA, RIGOBERTO
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-07-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR CLAUDIA W. BRISSON.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (CONDITIONAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, GEORGE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR APR-05-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JAN-30-2012 ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-05-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JUN-07-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-19-2011. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-15-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 610. JUL-22-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR WILLIAM FRANCIS MCLAUGHLIN.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT BAY BRIDGE TOWING PINEDA, RIGOBERTO FERNANDEZ, CRISPIN DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-22-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-18-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-07-2011
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE SEP-29-2011.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, GEORGE SERVED MAR-28-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PINEDA, RIGOBERTO
